title: [FIRRTL] LowerClasses creates duplicate symbols for external modules with the same defname

features.name: multiple parameterized extmodule declarations sharing the same defname
features.description: Code should include two or more external module declarations that map to the same underlying hardware module name (defname) but are specialized with different parameter values, so that a lowering pass must deduplicate class creation by defname

features.name: property-typed port on external module instantiated multiple times
features.description: Code should include an external module with a property-typed input port (firrtl.integer) that is instantiated more than once, with property assignments made to each instance's property port

features.name: two differently-parametrized extmodule instances with shared defname inside one parent module
features.description: Code should include a parent module that instantiates two differently-parametrized external modules which share the same defname, and assigns the same integer property value to both property ports
